title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

title: One or more Python packages fail to import — the service cannot start
description: Remediate EXEC001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Verify every import succeeds: `python -c 'from src.<pkg>.main import app'`. Use string annotations (`-> "TypeName"`) for TYPE_CHECKING-only imports. Use `request: Request` (not `app: FastAPI`) in FastAPI dependency functions.
summary: Verify every import succeeds: `python -c 'from src.<pkg>.main import app'`. Use string annotations (`-> "TypeName"`) for TYPE_CHECKING-only imports. Use `request: Request` (not `app: FastAPI`) in FastAPI dependency functions.

title: One or more repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder text instead of project-specific guidance
description: Remediate SKILL001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
summary: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
